task_description: Implement Phase 3 - EDR Engine with full monitoring capabilities: ProcessMonitor, FileMonitor, RegistryMonitor, MemoryMonitor, BehaviorAnalyzer, DetectionRulesEngine, AlertManager, TelemetryCollector, PersistenceDetection, RansomwareDetection, LateralMovementDetection, IncidentTimeline. Update EDR and Monitor stubs to fully functional implementations.

verification.summary: 156 test cases pass (80+ new EDR tests). Build completes successfully. All 12 EDR components implemented with full integration via EDREngine orchestrator and MonitorEngine delegation. Review-fix pass addressed 7 issues: wired feedEventsToAnalysis and detectLateralMovement, added capacity limits to AlertManager/RegistryMonitor/IncidentTimeline, pre-compiled regex in DetectionRulesEngine, removed redundant proc read.
